calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For An Assignment Order
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.'S Motion For An Assignment Order.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for an assignment order" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and states the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For An Assignment Order
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Continued To Sep-19-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

ASSIGNEE THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. Notice Of Motion For An Assignment Order continued to September 19, 2023 on the Court's own motion. Counsel has been notifed by email of the new date of hearing on September 14, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For An Assignment Order
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Continued To Sep-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: ASSIGNEE THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.'s Motion For An Assignment Order.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard on the Law and Motion Calendar on Thursday, September 14th at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
